revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:天岩戸神社, en:Amanoiwato Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Amanoiwato_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Amanoiwato_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:37, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:22, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:21, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/46369873 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:天岩戸神社 | revid=46369873 --> 混雑時のシャトルバスについて「駐車場は無料だがシャトルバスは有料」と言う記述を削除しました。理由は、当初確かにバスが有料だったのですが、2012年は無料で運行されたこと、また今後の状況により再び有償化される可能性もあると考えられたので、ここでは料金に付いて触れない方が読者に誤解を与えないと判断したためです。{{Unsigned2|Muzinabear|2013年2月23日 (土) 13:31 (UTC)|[[特別:投稿記録/121.102.99.48|121.102.99.48]]}} : それ以前に [[WP:NOT]] にもとづいて除去されるべきでしたね。--[[特別:投稿記録/121.102.99.48|121.102.99.48]] 2013年2月23日 (土) 13:36 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198531642 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Amanoiwato Shrine | revid=1198531642 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=y|myth=y}} }}
